title: bidens hillebrandiana subsp. hillebrandiana
intro: Bidens hillebrandiana subsp. hillebrandiana, also known as Hillebrand's Beggar Lice, is a plant species belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae), native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. Bidens hillebrandiana subsp. hillebrandiana can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties.
